ecarx.carext.update.ota

Annotation Type InstallErrorEcu.EcuStatus


  • @Retention(value=SOURCE)
public static @interface InstallErrorEcu.EcuStatus
    ECU state.
    Since:
    11

    • Field Detail

      • SUCCESS

        public static final int SUCCESS
        Installation success.
        Since:
        11

      • UPDATING

        public static final int UPDATING
        Installation in progress.
        Since:
        11

      • NO_INSTALLED

        public static final int NO_INSTALLED
        Not installed.
        Since:
        11
